description: Live TD stage options and windows for the selected well.
sql: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT g.s AS label, g.s AS value, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((g.s) - 1) * 1800)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(to_timestamp(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM CAST('2024-06-01 08:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP)) + (((g.s) - 1) * 1800 + 1200)) AS TIMESTAMP) AS stage_end_ts, 300 AS sample_count FROM (VALUES ('Alpha 1H','Alpha 1','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',101,'42-001-0001',6), ('Alpha 2H','Alpha 2','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-1',102,'42-001-0002',6), ('Alpha 3H','Alpha 3','Fleet Alpha','Pad A-2',103,'42-001-0003',5), ('Bravo 1H','Bravo 1','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',201,'42-002-0001',6), ('Bravo 2H','Bravo 2','Fleet Bravo','Pad B-1',202,'42-002-0002',4)) AS w(name, well_family, fleet_name, pad_name, well_id, api_num, stage_count) CROSS JOIN generate_series(1, 6) AS g(s) WHERE name = :well_name AND g.s <= stage_count ORDER BY label ) q
